title: Constraints on naming and SEAL attachment.
content:
Constraints on naming and SEAL attachment.
Guidance on which LAYER and DOMAIN this run is responsible for.

7.2 World-Level Prompts

$PROMPT_ROOT/world contains templates for seeding and evolving worlds. Examples:

WORLD-MYTH-PROMPT-SEED-WORLD-0100-v0_1
WORLD-MYTH-PROMPT-EXPAND-CHAR-0100-v0_1
WORLD-WAVE-PROMPT-PLAN-ARCS-0100-v0_1

These prompts:

Ask for world IDs and brief context.
Instruct the AI to read corresponding world entries from $ARCHIVE_ROOT/worlds and $ARCHIVE_ROOT/characters.
Require updates to manifest entries and SEALs.

7.3 Workflow-Level Prompts

$PROMPT_ROOT/workflow provides templates for operational tasks: refactors, archive maintenance, release planning. Example:

WORKFLOW-ARCHIVE-PROMPT-CONDENSE-SESSIONS-0001-v0_1

It describes:

Selection criteria for sessions.
Summarization style aligned with Recursive Storytelling.
Expected outputs and SEAL metadata.
